title: Unnecessary .clone() in test code
description:
Several .clone() calls in test code exist only to satisfy borrow checker in test setups:

**lichen-link/src/link_layer.rs:**
- Line 607: `ll_bob.add_peer(alice_peer.clone())`
- Line 661: `ll_bob.add_peer(new_alice_peer.clone())`

**lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs:**
- Line 234: `self.state.msg1 = msg1.clone()`
- Line 388: `let mut ciphertext_3 = plaintext_3.clone()`

While test code is less critical, these indicate potential API improvements (e.g., `add_peer` could take `&PeerIdentity` and clone internally if needed).
close_reason: Removed unnecessary .clone() in EDHOC: ciphertext_3 now built directly instead of cloning plaintext_3. Link layer test clones already removed in prior refactoring.
